requirements.task_name: Add a 16GB RAM business laptop under $1200 with 4+ stars (quantity 2) to cart
requirements.task_description: Find a business laptop with specific specs and add 2 units of the cheapest matching model to the cart.

requirements.task_name: Submit a quote request for a custom CRM integration project with a defined budget and timeline
requirements.task_description: Submit a CRM integration quote with name/email, correct project type, budget 15k–25k, next-month start date, and phone contact preference.

requirements.task_name: Schedule an on-site hardware maintenance visit for 10–20 workstations next month
requirements.task_description: Book on-site hardware maintenance for 10–20 workstations on a next-month date (10th–20th), morning slot, with office details.

requirements.task_name: Choose the cheapest IT support plan that includes 24/7 support and on-site visits and start sign-up
requirements.task_description: Select the lowest-priced IT support plan that has both 24/7 support and on-site visits, then start the sign-up and fill company details.

requirements.task_name: Save a knowledge base article on server overheating for a specific server model
requirements.task_description: Find an overheating article for ProRack Server X200 (or closest), save it to 'Server Issues' folder, then access it via saved items.

requirements.task_name: Add three different hardware accessories under $50 with 4+ star ratings and free shipping to cart and apply a promo code
requirements.task_description: Select three accessories (different categories like keyboard/mouse/cable) under $50, 4+ stars, free shipping, add 1 of each to cart, apply 'SAVE10', select free shipping, and proceed to checkout.

requirements.task_name: Register for an upcoming cloud migration training session and set experience level
requirements.task_description: Find a future cloud migration training/webinar, register 1 seat, set time zone to UTC-05 / Eastern, and experience level to Intermediate.

requirements.task_name: Configure a custom server between $3,000 and $4,000 and add it to a quote cart with a maintenance plan
requirements.task_description: Use configurator to build a rack server (≥32GB RAM, ≥2TB storage), price between $3k–$4k, with a 3‑year maintenance plan, add to quote cart, and proceed with quote.
